title: Extend command_bead_list with --status, --agent, and --feature-root filters
description: Extend `command_bead_list` in `src/agent_takt/cli/commands/bead.py` to apply three new post-load filters. After fetching all beads from storage, filter by: `--status` (keep beads whose status is in the requested set, OR within --status, AND with other filters); `--agent` (keep beads whose agent_type is in the requested set); `--feature-root` (resolve ID via `storage.resolve_bead_id(prefix)`, keep beads whose feature_root_id matches). All three filters combine AND-wise with each other and with the existing `--label` filter. The existing `--label` filter, `--json` output, and no-filter behavior must be unmodified.
acceptance_criteria: --status ready --status blocked returns beads matching either status (OR)
--agent developer --agent recovery returns beads matching either agent type
--feature-root B-xxxx returns only beads with that feature_root_id
--status and --agent combined with --label gives AND semantics
takt bead list with no new flags returns the same output as before
